response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software engineer with over 15 years of industry experience, including multiple Staff and Senior roles. He possesses deep expertise in the required TypeScript, Node.js, and React stack, alongside strong cloud, containerization, and database experience. His recent work with AI-agent infrastructure and strong advocacy for TDD and software craftsmanship make him an exceptionally strong fit for this Senior Fullstack Developer position.
strengths: Extensive experience with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and cloud/containerization technologies (AWS, Kubernetes, Docker).
Recent and highly relevant experience in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP).
Strong testing background with a deep commitment to TDD, having built custom testing frameworks and taught testing courses.
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest, though his deep Node.js and testing expertise suggests a rapid learning curve.
Frequent job changes in recent years, including a current career gap.
Secondary stack (Kotlin/Java) experience appears somewhat dated, primarily from his time at Altom Consulting (2016-2018).
